raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": null,
  "rationale": "There is no clean FRED series tracking DPA Title III or DoD Industrial Base Fund disbursements specifically to rare earth processing. Federal defense outlays (FDEFX) or federal nondefense investment series are far too aggregate to detect targeted critical minerals funding events. Analog episodes for this Node are better identified through policy history (e.g., DPA invocations for beryllium, lithium, COVID medical supplies) than via a macro time series.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 60,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: There is no clean FRED series tracking DPA Title III or DoD Industrial Base Fund disbursements specifically to rare earth processing. Federal defense outlays (FDEFX) or federal nondefense investment series are far too aggregate to detect targeted critical minerals funding events. Analog episodes for this Node are better identified through policy history (e.g., DPA invocations for beryllium, lithium, COVID medical supplies) than via a macro time series.

raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": null,
  "rationale": "FRED does not maintain a dedicated rare earth oxide or NdPr/Dy/Tb price index. The closest available proxies (PPI for primary metals, IMF metals price index PALLFNFINDEXQ) are dominated by base metals and would not reflect rare earth specific supply shocks. Rare earth prices are typically tracked via Argus, Asian Metal, or Shanghai Metals Market data, none of which are on FRED. Returning null rather than inventing a series ID.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 3,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: FRED does not maintain a dedicated rare earth oxide or NdPr/Dy/Tb price index. The closest available proxies (PPI for primary metals, IMF metals price index PALLFNFINDEXQ) are dominated by base metals and would not reflect rare earth specific supply shocks. Rare earth prices are typically tracked via Argus, Asian Metal, or Shanghai Metals Market data, none of which are on FRED. Returning null rather than inventing a series ID.

raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": null,
  "rationale": "No FRED series cleanly tracks NdFeB magnet prices, rare earth oxide prices, or EV/wind OEM input costs. FRED carries broad PPI series (e.g., PPIACO, WPU10) but none specifically capture rare earth permanent magnet costs. The closest proxies (rare earth oxide indices, Argus/Asian Metal NdPr quotes) are not on FRED. Recommend skipping FRED-based analog search for this node or using qualitative analogs (2010-11 China rare earth export quota shock, 2021-22 NdPr price spike) curated manually.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 3,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: No FRED series cleanly tracks NdFeB magnet prices, rare earth oxide prices, or EV/wind OEM input costs. FRED carries broad PPI series (e.g., PPIACO, WPU10) but none specifically capture rare earth permanent magnet costs. The closest proxies (rare earth oxide indices, Argus/Asian Metal NdPr quotes) are not on FRED. Recommend skipping FRED-based analog search for this node or using qualitative analogs (2010-11 China rare earth export quota shock, 2021-22 NdPr price spike) curated manually.
